# RMBL Knowledge Commons

> Unified search platform for environmental research at the Rocky Mountain Biological Laboratory (RMBL) and Gunnison Basin, Colorado.

## About

The RMBL Knowledge Commons connects scientific publications, community documents, research datasets, and a knowledge graph of species, concepts, protocols, and places studied at one of the longest-running field biology stations in North America. The platform supports researchers, land managers, and community members working on environmental issues in the Upper Gunnison Basin.

## API (add ?format=text for LLM-friendly plain text)

- [Search](/api/v1/search?q=YOUR_QUERY&format=text): Full-text search across all collections
- [Publications](/api/v1/publications/{id}?format=text): Publication detail with authors, abstract, entities, citations
- [Datasets](/api/v1/datasets/{id}?format=text): Dataset detail with creators and entities
- [Documents](/api/v1/documents/{id}?format=text): Document detail with entities and stakeholders
- [Authors](/api/v1/authors/{id}?format=text): Author profile with works and co-authors
- [Entities](/api/v1/entities/{type}/{id}?format=text): Species, concepts, protocols, places, stakeholders
- [Entity Browse](/api/v1/entities/{type}?format=text): List entities by type (species, concept, protocol, place, stakeholder)
- [Related Works](/api/v1/related/{collection}/{id}?format=text): Find related items via semantic similarity, shared entities, co-authorship, and citations
- [Neighborhoods](/api/v1/neighborhoods?format=text): Browse 154 research communities
- [Neighborhood Detail](/api/v1/neighborhoods/{id}?format=text): Community detail with research primer
- [Frontiers](/api/v1/frontiers?format=text): Browse research frontiers (synthesized knowledge gaps with key questions and concrete actions)
- [Frontier Detail](/api/v1/frontiers/{id}?format=text): Frontier detail with narrative, questions, actions, data gaps, contributing neighborhoods, and source statements

## Collections

- 4,852 publications (peer-reviewed articles, theses, student papers from 1928-2025)
- 1,381 documents (community/policy documents from the Sustainable Living Library)
- 1,426 datasets (research datasets from 8 discovery sources)
- 841 stories (news articles from local and national outlets, 1981-2026, 13 LLM-classified types)
- 6,696 authors with ORCID enrichment and deduplication
- 1,206 species with ITIS taxonomic validation
- 4,874 scientific concepts with definitions
- 1,474 research protocols with descriptions
- 1,954 geographic places with coordinates
- 5,023 stakeholders (agencies, organizations, institutions)
- 151 research neighborhoods with AI-generated research primers
- 98 research frontiers — synthesized knowledge gaps clustered from neighborhood-level gap statements, with key questions, concrete actions, and linked entities
- 98,252 entity mentions linking items to the knowledge graph
- 143,289 citation references with 10,619 internal links

## MCP Server

An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server is available for Claude Desktop and other MCP-compatible AI assistants. See the project repository for setup instructions.

## Source

- Website: https://rmblknowledgecommons.org
- Repository: https://github.com/ikb-rmbl/RMBL_knowledge_hub
